Title: Big Dump
Wasted
Clean Up
Cleaner Needed
Messy Situation
Magic Trick
Description:
I need you to pick up a package and get rid of it. [Timed]

Don't give a crap where you take it as long as it's off-world and no one ever finds it. [Stops]

I don't know what happened, and I don't really care, but someone made a pretty big mess and we're looking for a discrete individual to make the problem vanish by disposing of a package. 

Pretty simple, really. It's not like I'm asking you to [FakeOut]. [Stops][Timed]

Just got an urgent comm from some people I used to run with. They're not saying much but it sounds like they had a pretty serious 'accident.' Want someone to take care of dumping a package off-world. 

[Stops]I'd plan on getting your ship's cargo bay washed when this is done. [Timed]

Got a request for a cleaner. There's a package wrapped up and ready to drag off-world, just need a ship to take it somewhere that security won't think to look. 

[Stops]And don't even think about opening it up. Whatever's in there is better left sealed up. [Timed]

Best part of our line of work? You never know what you're going to be doing one day to the next. 

Take today for instance. Today you're going to be making a package disappear off-world. [Stops][Timed]

How 'bout that? Who knows what you'll be doing tomorrow, right?

I need you to [FakeOut] ... Ha! Wouldn't that be awesome? 

Kidding aside, I need you to grab a package and dump it off-world. [Timed] [Stops]Thanks.
Stops: The package in question will be waiting for you at a Salvage Yard on Daymar.
Anyway, grab the package from a Salvage Yard on Daymar and drop it where ever.
And in case you're curious, the pickup is at a Salvage Yard on Daymar.
Make sure you got room. This'll be a couple stops.
Since you'll be out there, I figure you can clean up a few other messes while you're at it.
There are a few other stops I'll need you to make as well.
FakeOut: rob the Prime Central Core Bank
Timed: Not a lot of time on this. Puts everyone at risk the longer it sits out there.
They're expecting this to be taken care of right away. Not sure why it's so urgent, but it's not really any of my business.
Get a move on, too. Quicker it's done, the quicker they can get back to business as usual.
They need this sorted out, so see if you can hurry it up, okay?
